BoundAttributes.Documentation:
<member name="P:Sandbox.UI.BaseVirtualPanel.OnLastCell">
            <summary>

        </member>

BoundAttributes.Name: Items
BoundAttributes.Documentation:
<member name="P:Sandbox.UI.BaseVirtualPanel.Items">
            <summary>
            Replaces the current items. Only triggers a rebuild if the sequence is actually different.
            When set to an IList (like List<T>), changes to the source list will be automatically detected.
            </summary>
        </member>

TagHelpers.Name: onfocus
TagHelpers.Documentation: Sets the '@onfocus' attribute to the provided string or delegate value. A delegate value should be of type 'System.EventArgs'.

BoundAttributes.Name: @onfocus
BoundAttributes.Documentation: Sets the '@onfocus' attribute to the provided string or delegate value. A delegate value should be of type 'System.EventArgs'.

BoundAttributeParameters.Name: preventDefault
BoundAttributeParameters.Documentation: Specifies whether to cancel (if cancelable) the default action that belongs to the '@onfocus' event.

BoundAttributeParameters.Name: stopPropagation
BoundAttributeParameters.Documentation: Specifies whether to prevent further propagation of the '@onfocus' event in the capturing and bubbling phases.

BoundAttributeParameters.Documentation: Specifies whether to cancel (if cancelable) the default action that belongs to the '@onmousemove' event.

BoundAttributeParameters.Name: stopPropagation
BoundAttributeParameters.Documentation: Specifies whether to prevent further propagation of the '@onmousemove' event in the capturing and bubbling phases.
